name: Remote WMI ActiveScriptEventConsumers
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
SIGMA Title: Remote WMI ActiveScriptEventConsumers
SIGMA Description: Detect potential adversaries leveraging WMI ActiveScriptEventConsumers remotely to move laterally in a network

False positives:
- SCCM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4624 AND "Logon Type"=3 AND LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%scrcons.exe') AND (NOT(LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%0x3e7%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Remote WMI ActiveScriptEventConsumers on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4624 AND "Logon Type"=3 AND LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%scrcons.exe') AND (NOT(LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%0x3e7%')) AQL filter query
